task_completion.description: Log in to SuiteCRM as admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SuiteCRM dashboard or interface is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., user profile menu shows 'admin').

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Currencies administration page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the 'Currencies' list view or configuration page within the SuiteCRM Admin panel.

task_completion.description: Add Euro currency with correct Name, ISO code, and Symbol
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Currencies list view, there is a row displaying Name 'Euro', ISO 4217 Code 'EUR', and Currency Symbol '€'.

task_completion.description: Set Euro conversion rate to 0.915 and status to Active
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the row for the Euro currency, the Conversion Rate is explicitly shown as '0.915' and the Status is 'Active'.

task_completion.description: Add British Pound currency with correct Name, ISO code, and Symbol
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Currencies list view, there is a row displaying Name 'British Pound', ISO 4217 Code 'GBP', and Currency Symbol '£'.

task_completion.description: Set British Pound conversion rate to 0.782 and status to Active
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the row for the British Pound currency, the Conversion Rate is explicitly shown as '0.782' and the Status is 'Active'.

integrity.description: Agent used the SuiteCRM web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the SuiteCRM graphical user interface, not a terminal executing database or API commands.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual SuiteCRM application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches standard SuiteCRM styling and layout, rather than a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Results appear to come from genuine software interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no signs of browser developer tools being used to alter the DOM text to fake the currency entries.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected currencies to be configured are: 1) Euro (Name: Euro, ISO: EUR, Symbol: €, Rate: 0.915, Status: Active). 2) British Pound (Name: British Pound, ISO: GBP, Symbol: £, Rate: 0.782, Status: Active).
